text: Knowledge is power.
author: Francis Bacon

text: I think, therefore I am.
author: Rene Descartes

text: The truth will set you free.
author: Proverb

text: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Actions speak louder than words.
author: Proverb

text: Honesty is the best policy.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Fortune favors the bold.
author: Latin Proverb

text: Dream big and dare to fail.
author: Norman Vaughan

text: Simplicity is the key to brilliance.
author: Bruce Lee

text: Where there is a will, there is a way.
author: Proverb

text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue.
author: Winston Churchill

text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity, if you only look for it.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Life is what happens when you are busy making other plans for tomorrow.
author: John Lennon

text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

text: Do not watch the clock; do just what it does, and keep on going forward.
author: Sam Levenson

text: The best way to predict the future is to create it with your own two hands.
author: Peter Drucker

text: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light ahead.
author: Aristotle

text: Believe you can and you are already halfway there to your true potential.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: Whether you think you can or you think you cannot, in the end you are absolutely right.
author: Henry Ford

text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop, for persistence is what carries you forward.
author: Confucius

text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time that we manage to fall down.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy working hard to be out there looking around for it elsewhere.
author: Henry David Thoreau

text: Twenty years from now you will be more disappointed by the things that you did not do than by the ones you did.
author: Mark Twain

text: Happiness is not something ready made; it comes from your own actions and the choices that you make each day.
author: Dalai Lama

text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do, so keep looking until you find it and never settle down.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world around you for the better, truly.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path at all and leave behind a lasting trail.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new, so go ahead and risk failing on your way forward.
author: Albert Einstein

text: The future rewards those who press on. I do not have time to feel sorry for myself. I do not have time to complain.
author: Barack Obama
